results.title: Asking Eric: I’m having a hard time getting over a 2004 breakup even though I don’t want him back
results.description: I am with a wonderful man now. But I just cannot figure this out.

results.title: No movement in Keller, Grapevine-Colleyville public records lawsuits
results.description: Tim Davis talks about choosing his new born sons name as he thanks the board for having a meeting so he could get out of the house during a JPS Health Network monthly Board of Managers Meeting in the OPC Auditorium at John Peter Smith Hospital in Fort Worth, Texas, Thursday, May 08, 2025.

results.title: Demonstration outside York Crown Court about Palestine Action cases
results.description: Local residents demonstrated outside York Crown Court to publicise their views on two cases involving Palestine Action in London.
